title: Provider Response Cache Entry
description: On-disk record for a single cached provider response. The launcher's pack-lifecycle layer keys cache entries by `(promptHash, seed, providerId, modelHint)` so a regenerate from the same input is free. The full lifecycle policy (TTL, force-regenerate bypass, GC, disk quota) lives in `docs/architecture/pack-lifecycle.md`.

payload.description: Cached provider response. The validator does not introspect the payload; it is opaque to the lifecycle layer and validated downstream by Stage 3 (shape validation).

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the entry was first written.

lastReadAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent cache hit. Used by the LRU eviction rule.
